posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

It’s very odd to me that, after many years Moday still does not suport changing ONLY the automation triggers…

How come we have to remake an entire recipe only for substitute one single trigger?

image1104×354 23.7 KB

Please note that as we hover the trash can, all the automation is scraped!

Hope more users feel the same way to encourage Monday devs to fix this up for us.

Best regards,
